description: The ``Raw Data Tool Events`` node takes in a referenced raw data tool, and depending on the actions or inputs from the user, this node will fire specific events. This can let the user make a custom tool to run any custom flux when connected from this node.

fields.Equipped: Fires when the tool is equipped.
fields.Dequipped: Fires when the tool is dequipped.
fields.ToolUpdate: Fires every frame when this tool is equipped on the user.
fields.PrimaryPressed: Fires when primary is pressed by the user while this tool is equipped.
fields.PrimaryHeld: Fires when primary is held by the user while this tool is equipped.
fields.PrimaryReleased: Fires when primary is released by the user while this tool is equipped.
fields.SecondaryPressed: Fires when secondary is pressed by the user while this tool is equipped.
fields.SecondaryHeld: Fires when secondary is held by the user while this tool is equipped.
fields.SecondaryReleased: Fires when secondary is released by the user while this tool is equipped.
